title: Vismia crassa
taxonomy: Vismia crassa is classified in the family Hypericaceae, commonly known as the St. John's Wort family. This family is part of the larger order Malpighiales, which is a group of flowering plants in the clade rosids. The family Hypericaceae is primarily composed of shrubs and small trees, with a distribution range across the world's tropical and subtropical regions. Vismia crassa is a species of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Further classification of Vismia crassa may include its genus and species designation within the kingdom Plantae.
